title: AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 – Key Highlights

detail.title: AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 – Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Download AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 from the official portal. Check release date, direct link, step‑by‑step process, exam date, and important instructions for the law entrance.

content.text: AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 has been released online for candidates appearing in the AMU law entrance exam, and it is a mandatory document as it confirms your exam centre, date, timing and essential instructions for the test day. By downloading the AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 from the official AMU portal within the given timeline, you can avoid last‑minute issues at the exam centre and ensure a smooth, hassle‑free entry to the examination hall.
Click Here: AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026

sections.heading: AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 – Key Highlights

rows: First or second week of April 2026

sections.heading: How to Download AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 – Step‑by‑Step

content.text: Candidates must log in to the portal to download their AMU BA LLB hall ticket. Follow these steps:

items: Visit the official AMU website or controller of exams portal: Open amucontrollerexams.com or go to the AMU admissions section via amu.ac.in.
Open amucontrollerexams.com or go to the AMU admissions section via amu.ac.in.
Find the admit card link: Click on the AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 or AMU Entrance Exam 2026 Admit Card link.
Click on the AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 or AMU Entrance Exam 2026 Admit Card link.
Login to your candidate account: Enter your application number / user ID and password or date of birth, as asked on the portal.
Enter your application number / user ID and password or date of birth, as asked on the portal.
Access the hall ticket: After logging in, click on “Download Admit Card” for the BA LLB course.
After logging in, click on “Download Admit Card” for the BA LLB course.
Verify details carefully: Check candidate name, roll number, exam centre, exam date, reporting time and other details on the screen.
Check candidate name, roll number, exam centre, exam date, reporting time and other details on the screen.
Download and print: Save the PDF admit card and take at least 2–3 printouts on A4 size paper for exam day and future use.
Save the PDF admit card and take at least 2–3 printouts on A4 size paper for exam day and future use.

content.text: Keep the soft copy saved in your email or cloud so that you can reprint if required.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026

content.text: The admit card carries crucial information that you must double‑check before the exam. Typically, the AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 includes:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Roll number / application number
Course name – BA LLB
Exam date and duration (AMU BA LLB exam on 26 April 2026)
Reporting time and gate closing time
Exam centre name and full address
Category (as filled in application form)
Important exam‑day instructions and rules

content.text: If you notice any mismatch (spelling error, wrong category, incorrect photo etc.), contact the AMU authorities as soon as possible using the details given on the official website.

sections.heading: Documents to Carry with AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the entrance exam, you must carry the following documents to the test centre:

items: Printed copy of AMU BA LLB Admit Card 2026 (preferably 2–3 copies)
Valid photo ID proof (any one – Aadhaar Card, Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence, PAN Card, or any other government‑issued ID as accepted by the university)
Recent passport‑size photographs, if specified in the instructions

content.text: Do not carry restricted items such as electronic gadgets, calculators, smart watches, notes or study material inside the exam hall, as they may lead to disqualification as per exam rules.
